TABLE 1. Clinical considerations for use of JYNNEOS* in special populations during an mpox outbreak — United States, 2025 
Population 
Clinical considerations 
Persons with atopic dermatitis, eczema, or other exfoliative skin conditions 
• No precautions needed. 
• Studies described in the package insert have indicated JYNNEOS is safe and effective in these circumstances. 
Persons with immunocompromising conditions † 
• No precautions needed. 
• JYNNEOS is safe in these persons because although it is a live virus vaccine, the virus is nonreplicating; it therefore acts like a nonlive vaccine but similar to other vaccines, JYNNEOS might be less effective in persons with severe immunocompromise.
